canonical_definition: A multimodal, multilingual benchmark for evaluating cultural understanding in vision-language models, consisting of 64,288 aligned text-image multiple-choice questions across 15 Indian languages and all 36 states and union territories, covering cultural themes like festivals, attire, cuisine, and heritage.
papers: Think Wider, Detect Sharper: Reinforced Reference Coverage for Document-Level Self-Contradiction Detection

definitions.text: A multimodal, multilingual benchmark for evaluating cultural understanding in vision-language models, consisting of 64,288 aligned text-image multiple-choice questions across 15 Indian languages and all 36 states and union territories, covering cultural themes like festivals, attire, cuisine, and heritage.
definitions.paper: Think Wider, Detect Sharper: Reinforced Reference Coverage for Document-Level Self-Contradiction Detection
